# Punto Reforma Málaga

> Architecture and total renovations in Málaga — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout.

> Arquitectura de interiores y reformas integrales en Málaga — para viviendas, pisos y locales comerciales. Carpintería a medida, cocinas y baños prime, coordinación de obra y gestión de permisos, desde la primera idea hasta la entrega. Un solo interlocutor responsable durante todo el proceso.

## Contact

- Website: https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/
- Email: info@puntoreforma.es
- Phone: +34 662 411 064
- Location: Málaga, Spain

## Services

- Reforma integral & gestión de obra — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arquitectura & diseño — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Cocinas & baños prime — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Carpintería a medida & metal — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Comprobaciones técnicas & permisos — technical checks, permit coordination and engineer procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Málaga

## Blog Articles

- [Ayudas IVA e IRPF para reformas en Málaga](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/ayudas-iva-irpf-reformas-malaga/): Reduced VAT at 10%, IRPF deduction in Andalusia and Next Generation grants for renovation in Málaga. Full 2026 guide with requirements and documentation.
- [Cambiar bañera por ducha en Málaga](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/cambiar-banera-por-ducha-malaga/): Converting a bath to shower in Málaga: 2026 prices (€900–8,500), step-by-step process, permits and community of owners rules.
- [Horario de obras en Málaga](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/horario-obras-comunidad-malaga/): Permitted working hours for renovation in Málaga, what to agree with the community of owners before starting and how to avoid complaints.
- [Licencias para reformar en Málaga](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/licencias-obras-malaga/): What you need to renovate a home in Málaga: works not requiring permits, comunicación previa and when a full licence is required.
- [Precio reforma de baño en Málaga 2026](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-malaga-precio/): Bathroom renovation prices in Málaga in 2026: costs by size and finish, what's included and what drives the budget up.
- [Precio reforma de cocina en Málaga](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-malaga-precio/): Kitchen renovation prices in Málaga in 2026: budget by size, materials, appliances and realistic project timelines.
- [Precio reforma integral en Málaga 2026](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-integral-malaga-precio/): Full renovation costs in Málaga in 2026: real prices per m², breakdown by trade, permits and what project management includes.
- [Reforma de piso para alquilar en Málaga](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-alquiler-malaga/): Renovation of a rental flat in Málaga 2026: which works give the best ROI, durable materials and what landlords need to know.
- [Reforma de piso antiguo en Málaga](https://malaga.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-antiguo-malaga/): Renovating an old flat in Málaga: how to preserve hydraulic tiles and high ceilings, what to check first and realistic costs.
